description: Relationship graph cleared so new graph edges come only from reviewed enriched imports.

relationships.notes: The operating system coordinates hardware resources for applications and users.
The operating system provides the runtime platform used by applications.
File or data compatibility is separate from whether an application executable can run on an OS.
Application compatibility depends on the operating system platform.
Executable files are OS-specific application artifacts.
